reviews.comment:
excelente lugar tiene una confitería para tomar algo puede cargar nafta cambiar aceite revisar los neumáticos muy bien atendidos y funcionan las 24 horas José María.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, it has a confectionery shop where you can get something to eat, you can fill up with gas, change your oil, check your tires, very well attended and they operate 24 hours a day. José María.
